## Hi there 👋

I build **AI safety tools** on Android Termux. Zero dependencies. Pure Python.

### 🔍 Featured: Anchor — LLM Hallucination Detector

[![Stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/malaxiya20250530-glitch/anchor-llm-in-truth?style=social)](https://github.com/malaxiya20250530-glitch/anchor-llm-in-truth)

7M facts. 14 checkers. Detects when LLMs hallucinate.

```bash
python3 hallucination_detector.py "朱元璋 invented hotpot"
# → contradicted (90%)
```

→ [anchor-llm-in-truth](https://github.com/malaxiya20250530-glitch/anchor-llm-in-truth)

---

🛠️ **Tech Stack:** Python · SQLite · FTS · Chain of Responsibility · Knowledge Graph

📱 **Environment:** Android Termux · Zero pip install
